query:
=== Recent conversation (last 0 exchanges) ===
[Assistant] Clean. Now re-run the synthesizer with the corrected artifacts.
[tool: Agent(uni-vision-guardian) → The report is written. Running the self-check:

- [x] ALIGNMENT-REPORT.md follows the template format
- [x] All checks evaluated — none skipped without N/A justification
- [x] No VARIANCE or FAIL items — "Variances Requiring Approval" section states none
- [x] Scope gaps and scope additions both]
[Assistant] Now re-run the vision guardian and synthesizer to produce aligned artifacts.
=== End recent conversation ===

entries.title: Architecture diagram informal headers diverge from spec — testers assert against wrong strings
Procedure: verify section order from SPEC before spawning formatter or test-plan agent
SPEC is authoritative over IMPLEMENTATION-BRIEF for section ordering — spawn formatter agent from SPEC directly
Security reviewer must verify artifact paths exist before cold-read orientation
